description_long: This object is a pair of virtual reality (VR) goggles with an attached head strap and a separate controller or sensor unit. The main headset features a smooth, matte black exterior with a contoured front panel and visible seams, likely for housing electronic components and lenses. The head strap is adjustable, padded, and connects securely to the sides of the headset, providing comfort and stability during use. The secondary unit, which appears to be a controller or tracking device, has a similarly sleek design with a curved top and a visible strap or band for securing it to the user's hand or wrist. Both components rest on a flat, dark surface, emphasizing their portable and ergonomic design. The overall appearance suggests a modern, high-tech device intended for immersive digital experiences.
description: A sleek, black virtual reality headset with an adjustable head strap and a separate controller or sensor unit, both designed for comfort and portability.
description_view_0: The front of the VR headset is visible, showing its contoured faceplate and the attached head strap, with the controller unit positioned to the right.
description_view_1: The headset is seen from the rear, highlighting the padded interior and the adjustable strap, while the controller's ergonomic shape is more apparent.
description_view_2: A direct view of the headset's lenses and interior padding, with the controller unit lying flat and its strap visible.
description_view_3: The headset is viewed from behind and above, emphasizing the curvature of the head strap and the overall compactness of both units.
